facebook.caption:
4.6 stars. 287 reviews. And most tourists walk right past it.

Vựa hải sản nhà Su & Bee on Đường Bạch Đằng is where locals go for fresh seafood in Phú Quốc. No gimmicks, no beach-club markup. Just solid food and a crowd that keeps coming back.

If you're staying in Khu 1, this one's a short walk away. Add it to your list before the crowds figure it out.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
